name: aigc-credit-radar
description: Local-first desktop radar for expiring AIGC platform credits.
author: AIGC Credit Radar Contributors

scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && node scripts/generate-app-icon.mjs && node scripts/build-desktop.mjs
scripts.release:win: npm run pack:desktop && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-win-release.ps1
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test scripts/devLauncher.test.ts scripts/desktopPackaging.test.ts extensions/aigc-credit-radar-browser/autoCapture.test.ts src/adapters/higgsfieldCli.test.ts src/adapters/dreaminaCli.test.ts src/adapters/dreaminaInstaller.test.ts src/adapters/browserSession.test.ts src/adapters/browserExtension.test.ts src/adapters/browserExtensionInstall.test.ts src/adapters/bookmarkletConnector.test.ts src/data/realMode.test.ts src/data/connectors.test.ts src/i18n.test.ts src/lib/risk.test.ts src/lib/resetRuleForm.test.ts src/lib/scheduler.test.ts src/lib/persistence.test.ts src/lib/accountRecords.test.ts src/lib/clipboardImage.test.ts src/lib/ocrAssets.test.ts src/lib/dreaminaFlow.test.ts src/lib/connectionInitialState.test.ts src/lib/connectionServiceHealth.test.ts src/lib/browserConnectionStatus.test.ts src/lib/localServiceCors.test.ts src/lib/monitorSummary.test.ts
